name: Desperate Man
description: Not a monster. A person. Starving, armed with a rusty knife, and past the point where morality is a luxury. He doesn't want to hurt you. He wants to eat tomorrow. That distinction matters less than you'd think when the knife is out.
behavior: Threatens first. Fights sloppy if you resist — fear and hunger, not skill. Will take whatever you drop and run. If you offer food willingly, breaks down crying.
